phrases.zh: 感受停在我发端的指尖
phrases.literal: Feeling the fingertips resting at the ends of my hair
phrases.literal_en: Feeling the fingertips resting at the ends of my hair

phrases.zh: 如何瞬间冻结时间
phrases.literal: How it instantly freezes time
phrases.literal_en: How it instantly freezes time

phrases.zh: 记住望着我坚定的双眼
phrases.literal: Remembering the determined eyes looking at me
phrases.literal_en: Remembering the determined eyes looking at me

phrases.zh: 也许已经没有明天
phrases.literal: Perhaps there is no tomorrow left
phrases.literal_en: Perhaps there is no tomorrow left

phrases.zh: 面对浩瀚的星海我们微小得像尘埃
phrases.literal: Facing the vast sea of stars, we are as tiny as dust
phrases.literal_en: Facing the vast sea of stars, we are as tiny as dust

phrases.zh: 漂浮在一片无奈
phrases.literal: Floating in an expanse of helplessness
phrases.literal_en: Floating in an expanse of helplessness

phrases.zh: 缘份让我们相遇乱世以外
phrases.literal: Fate brought us together outside the chaotic world
phrases.literal_en: Fate brought us together outside the chaotic world

phrases.zh: 命运却要我们危难中相爱
phrases.literal: Yet destiny demands we fall in love amidst danger
phrases.literal_en: Yet destiny demands we fall in love amidst danger

phrases.zh: 也许未来遥远在光年之外
phrases.literal: Perhaps the future lies far beyond light years away
phrases.literal_en: Perhaps the future lies far beyond light years away

phrases.zh: 我愿守候未知里为你等待
phrases.literal: I am willing to wait for you in the unknown
phrases.literal_en: I am willing to wait for you in the unknown

phrases.zh: 我没想到为了你我能疯狂到山崩海啸
phrases.literal: I never thought for you I could go so wild as to make mountains collapse and oceans surge
phrases.literal_en: I never thought for you I could go so wild as to make mountains collapse and oceans surge

phrases.zh: 没有你根本不想逃我的大脑
phrases.literal: Without you, my mind has no desire to flee at all
phrases.literal_en: Without you, my mind has no desire to flee at all

phrases.zh: 为了你已经疯狂到脉搏心跳没有你
phrases.literal: For you, I have gone so crazy that without you, my pulse and heartbeat
phrases.literal_en: For you, I have gone so crazy that without you, my pulse and heartbeat

phrases.zh: 根本不重要
phrases.literal: Simply do not matter at all
phrases.literal_en: Simply do not matter at all

phrases.zh: 一双围在我胸口的臂弯
phrases.literal: A pair of arms wrapped around my chest
phrases.literal_en: A pair of arms wrapped around my chest

phrases.zh: 足够抵挡天旋地转
phrases.literal: Is enough to withstand the heavens and earth turning
phrases.literal_en: Is enough to withstand the heavens and earth turning

phrases.zh: 一种执迷不放手的倔强足以
phrases.literal: A stubborn obsession that refuses to let go is enough to
phrases.literal_en: A stubborn obsession that refuses to let go is enough to

phrases.zh: 点燃所有希望
phrases.literal: Ignite all hope
phrases.literal_en: Ignite all hope

phrases.zh: 宇宙磅礡而冷漠我们的爱微小却闪烁
phrases.literal: The universe is majestic and indifferent, our love is tiny yet shimmering
phrases.literal_en: The universe is majestic and indifferent, our love is tiny yet shimmering

phrases.zh: 颠簸却如此忘我
phrases.literal: Turbulent yet so completely absorbed
phrases.literal_en: Turbulent yet so completely absorbed

phrases.zh: 缘分让我们相遇乱世以外
phrases.literal: Fate let us meet outside the chaotic world
phrases.literal_en: Fate let us meet outside the chaotic world

phrases.zh: 命运却要我们危难中相爱
phrases.literal: Yet destiny wants us to love each other in times of crisis
phrases.literal_en: Yet destiny wants us to love each other in times of crisis

phrases.zh: 也许未来遥远在光年之外
phrases.literal: Perhaps the future is distant, beyond light-years
phrases.literal_en: Perhaps the future is distant, beyond light-years

phrases.zh: 我愿守候未知里为你等待
phrases.literal: I am willing to wait in the unknown for you
phrases.literal_en: I am willing to wait in the unknown for you

phrases.zh: 我没想到为了你我能疯狂到
phrases.literal: I didn't expect that for you I could go crazy to the point
phrases.literal_en: I didn't expect that for you I could go crazy to the point

phrases.zh: 山崩海啸没有你根本不想逃
phrases.literal: of mountains collapsing and seas roaring, without you I simply don't want to flee
phrases.literal_en: of mountains collapsing and seas roaring, without you I simply don't want to flee

phrases.zh: 我的大脑为了你已经疯狂到
phrases.literal: my brain has already gone crazy for you to the point
phrases.literal_en: my brain has already gone crazy for you to the point

phrases.zh: 脉搏心跳没有你根本不重
phrases.literal: where pulse and heartbeat, without you simply aren't important
phrases.literal_en: where pulse and heartbeat, without you simply aren't important

phrases.zh: 要也许航道以外
phrases.literal: Perhaps beyond the channel
phrases.literal_en: Perhaps beyond the channel

phrases.zh: 是醒不来的梦乱世
phrases.literal: is a dream that cannot be woken from, in chaotic times
phrases.literal_en: is a dream that cannot be woken from, in chaotic times

phrases.zh: 以外是纯粹的相拥
phrases.literal: beyond it is a pure embrace
phrases.literal_en: beyond it is a pure embrace

phrases.zh: 我没想到为了你我能疯狂到山崩海啸
phrases.literal: I didn't expect that for you I could go crazy to the point of mountains collapsing and seas roaring
phrases.literal_en: I didn't expect that for you I could go crazy to the point of mountains collapsing and seas roaring

phrases.zh: 没有你根本不想逃我的大脑为了你已经疯狂
phrases.literal: without you I simply don't want to flee, my brain has already gone crazy for you
phrases.literal_en: without you I simply don't want to flee, my brain has already gone crazy for you

phrases.zh: 到脉搏心跳没有你根本不重要
phrases.literal: to the point where pulse and heartbeat, without you, simply don't matter
phrases.literal_en: to the point where pulse and heartbeat, without you, simply don't matter

phrases.zh: 相遇乱世以外
phrases.literal: meeting beyond the chaotic world
phrases.literal_en: meeting beyond the chaotic world

phrases.zh: 危难中相爱相遇
phrases.literal: loving and meeting each other in times of peril
phrases.literal_en: loving and meeting each other in times of peril

phrases.zh: 乱世以外危难中
phrases.literal: Outside the chaotic times, in the midst of danger
phrases.literal_en: Outside the chaotic times, in the midst of danger

phrases.zh: 相爱我没想到
phrases.literal: I never expected us to love each other
phrases.literal_en: I never expected us to love each other
